# ParagonNodeComponent.ZOrder property

The component's true paint order — its index in [`Components`](../ParagonNodeRecipe/Components.md) (lower draws first / underneath). The per-rarity/-type disc is remapped to the base-disc position (below the symbol), NOT the template widget's appended scene position.

```csharp
public int ZOrder { get; set; }
```
